reasons: All three agents (codex, claudecode, openclaw) produced the required output file ma_divergence.txt with proper format
All three agents correctly returned 'no matching stocks' result, which is the appropriate response given the strict criteria
Codex's output format exactly matches the task specification with proper CSV header

Codex implemented complete detection logic including: 4 moving averages (5/10/20/30), convergence detection (<3% max distance), divergence detection (5>10>20>30 with >2% gaps), and volume verification (1.5x ratio)
Codex's approach was methodologically sound: used real data sources (akshare), implemented proper sliding window detection, and failed gracefully when no matches found
Claudecode's output used comment format instead of CSV format, which is less aligned with the task requirement
Openclaw's output also used comment format with Chinese characters
All agents demonstrated understanding of the complex multi-condition pattern detection required
merge_notes: Task requires identifying stocks with MA convergence followed by upward divergence with volume confirmation. All agents correctly implemented the detection logic but found no matching stocks in the ChiNext market for the specified period (ending 2024-08-08). This is a valid result given the strict criteria: convergence period with 4 MAs within 3% range for 5+ days, followed by divergence with 5>10>20>30 and >2% gaps between adjacent MAs, plus 1.5x volume increase. Codex's output format is preferred as it exactly matches the CSV specification in the task prompt.
